roa.docketEntryComment: SFPD'S OPP TO MOT TO RETURN PROPERTY FILED
DEFT'S OSC RE RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED
/X:RONNIE WAGNER APPEARED AS LEGAL COUNSEL FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/ /CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:MOTION GRANTED AS TO ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL PTC HEARD IN DEPT 24 BEFORE JUDGE BREALL/VD 06-24-11/X PEOPLE AMENDTO ADD COUNT 3 653F(D)PC/MISD/FAWA/IRR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INVOFF:SERGEANT WILLIAM SCOTT/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER KATHY WONG, SFPD OFFICER MICHAEL YOUNG, AND SERGEANT WILLIAM SCOTT/EXHM:1- EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:1A- BAGGIE CONTAINING PINK PILLS; 1B- ORANGEPILL BOTTLE/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:1 AND2/DEF:TO REMAIN OUT OF CUSTODY ON OR/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/987,2/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX /DEF:ORDERED NOT TO LOITER AT 1107 MARKET/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/
